title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Prince Pipes Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Prince Pipes Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes Capital India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes Capital India:
Prince Pipes Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
